response.justification: The candidate lacks direct C++ experience in industrial automation or high-performance systems, despite listing C++ only in a 2015 academic thesis context; their career is overwhelmingly focused on JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and web technologies, with no evidence of STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or industrial IoT protocols required for the role.
strengths: Strong full-stack and open-source contributions with diverse tech exposure
Demonstrated expertise in distributed systems and event-driven architectures
Active in mentoring, workshops, and technical communication
concerns: No professional C++ or STL experience beyond academic project
Absence of industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or OT protocols
Cloud experience is AWS/Node.js, not C++-based on-prem/cloud industrial platforms
